subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl-i-Qablí-'Alí! Hearken unto that which the Pen of Glory addresseth thee from the precincts of the Prison in this night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نبیل قبل علی اسمع ما یخاطبک به قلم العز فی  هذاللیل  عن شطر السجن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
